publication.reason: The 2026-07-03 ledger restored catalog/package parity but repeatedly recorded npm registry verification as not checked. Publication readiness is incomplete until the registry state is verified or explicitly blocked.
publication.action: Verify the npm registry/package state for architectonic-skills@0.1.3 through an allowed registry-capable path. Record installed package version, published files if available, and whether package/catalog/install-manifest parity is externally visible. Do not publish unless the approved publication workflow explicitly requires it.
